description:

I am The UP46 Rider. I am a small town boy from Shravasti. I have a huge crush on motorbikes and its my dream and I want to ride all kind of bikes thats why I have started motovlogging channel. I do biking reviews, moto vlogging, unboxing, entertainment, travelling, fooding, vlog videos.
Do subscribe my channel to join me on my journey and to watch such more videos from my channel. Thank you for visiting my channel!

Sponsorship & Business queries.

Bhai mere papa ne bike 2010 mi li thi mere paas national ka 3rd party aur digit ka od insurance hai.
Iss mahine 17 ko plan expire hone wala hai
To mye check kia har company ka comprehensive plan to pata chala ki icici 20k IDV de raha aur currently digit mi 17k ka insurance hai.

Mye kya karu , icici ka 20k to default hai max IDV 24K dikha raha hai

This thing is to good to be true actually

August 2025 kmi bike ko 15 saal ho jayega aur RC expire ho jayegi , extend karauga but

Kya mye icici ka insurance lu?
